description: Style NoteSporty fashion never looked this good! This pair of performance oriented force 10 shoes is the right choice to complement your casual weekend wear. The brand's shoes have always made the cut when it comes to off-duty dressing - this pair refines that look for you. What's more you can wear these shoes for a power walk as well.Product DetailsOlive green round toed slip on shoe with elasticated gussets at the sides of the tongueHas a mildly padded inner and tongue with decorative thread detail all overHas a thick rubber outsole, upraised at the heel with curvy lugs all overMaterial and CareSuedeWipe with clean dry cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
